title: Scale CloudNative-PG PostgreSQL to 3 replicas, enable PgBouncer, and configure automated backups
subtasks: Edit the CloudNative-PG Cluster CR to set spec.instances: 3 (1 primary, 2 replicas).
Deploy PgBouncer as a sidecar or separate Deployment in the databases namespace, configure connection pooling for all app connections.
Update all service connection strings to point to PgBouncer endpoint.
Configure CNPG automated backups: set spec.backup.barmanObjectStore with daily schedule and WAL archiving to S3-compatible Cloudflare R2 bucket.
Test failover by simulating primary pod failure and verifying automatic promotion.
Verify WAL files are present in R2 bucket and daily backup jobs complete successfully.

title: Scale Opstree Valkey to 3 replicas with Redis Sentinel and configure maxmemory policy
subtasks: Update the Opstree Valkey CR to set spec.clusterSize: 3 and enable Redis Sentinel for automatic failover.
Configure maxmemory and eviction policy (e.g., allkeys-lru) in the Valkey config.
Update service endpoints to use Sentinel discovery if supported by client libraries.
Test failover by killing the primary pod and verifying automatic promotion.
Monitor memory usage and eviction metrics to ensure policy is enforced.

title: Configure TLS certificates via cert-manager and update Ingress for all services
subtasks: Install cert-manager if not present; configure ClusterIssuer for Let's Encrypt (or internal CA if required).
Annotate all Ingress resources (NGINX or Envoy) to use cert-manager TLS certificates.
Update Ingress manifests for all HTTP services (equipment-catalog, rms, finance, customer-vetting, social-engine, morgan) to require HTTPS.
Test certificate issuance and renewal for all public endpoints.
Update service health checks to use HTTPS endpoints.

title: Configure Cloudflare CDN for static assets and enforce HTTPS
subtasks: Set up Cloudflare CDN rules for the R2 bucket serving static assets (images, uploads, etc).
Configure cache rules for /static, /images, and other asset paths.
Enable Always Use HTTPS and HSTS in Cloudflare dashboard for all public domains.
Test asset delivery via CDN and verify cache headers.
Document CDN purge and cache-busting procedures.

title: Enforce Cilium network policies restricting pod-to-pod traffic
subtasks: Author CiliumNetworkPolicy resources for each namespace/service:
Allow only required ingress/egress between services (e.g., app pods to database, Morgan to all services, block all other cross-namespace traffic).
Deny all other pod-to-pod traffic by default.
Test policy enforcement by attempting unauthorized pod-to-pod connections (should be blocked).
Document policy exceptions and update as new services are added.

title: Configure OpenTelemetry Collector, Jaeger with persistent storage, and SLO alerting
subtasks: Deploy OpenTelemetry Collector as a DaemonSet or Deployment in observability namespace.
Configure sampling rates appropriate for production (e.g., 1-10% for high-traffic endpoints, 100% for errors).
Deploy Jaeger with persistent storage (e.g., backed by a PVC or external storage) to retain traces.
Update all service deployments to export traces to the OpenTelemetry Collector endpoint.
Define Prometheus alert rules for SLO violations (e.g., p99 latency, error rate, pod down).
Test trace collection and alert firing by simulating SLO breaches.
